AI Innovation — Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

Redefining Digital Possibilities with AI

We stand at the forefront of the AI revolution in the MENA region, providing cutting-edge solutions, expert consultation, talent development, and strategic partnerships to businesses and governments across diverse sectors.

Explore Our Work → Contact Us →
Vision

A Catalyst for AI Innovation

Pillars is a leading Saudi AI holding company headquartered in Riyadh, focused on advancing artificial intelligence technologies in Saudi Arabia and the broader MENA region. As a catalyst for innovation, Pillars is dedicated to building new ventures, forging strategic partnerships, and nurturing AI technologies through collaboration with international enterprises.

We are committed to driving AI innovation, enabling digital transformation, and enhancing the regional AI ecosystem by fostering high-impact projects and ventures in sectors ranging from security to talent development.

6+
Focus Sectors
MENA
Regional Coverage
KSA
Headquartered in Riyadh
Mission

A Bold Mission

Our mission is to accelerate the adoption and advancement of AI in Saudi Arabia and the MENA region, through strategic investments, partnerships, and the creation of new ventures that bring cutting-edge AI solutions to market.

Our Approach

Building the Future, Together

At Pillars, we build and scale AI-driven ventures by partnering with global technology leaders. We leverage our strategic partnerships to bring world-class AI solutions, technologies, and expertise into the region, nurturing local talent and accelerating the development of AI-powered enterprises.

Our Focus

Where We Operate

01

Frontier AI Research

Pushing the boundaries of what's possible with artificial intelligence through cutting-edge research initiatives.

02

Energy & Utilities

Transforming energy and utility management through intelligent AI-powered optimization systems.

03

Manufacturing

Modernizing manufacturing with AI-driven automation, quality control, and predictive maintenance.

04

Data Centers

Building and optimizing the compute infrastructure that powers the AI revolution in the region.

05

Entertainment

Revolutionizing content creation and experiences through generative AI and immersive technologies.

06

Security & Safety

Enhancing security infrastructure with AI-powered threat detection and safety systems.

Portfolio

Our Companies

A growing portfolio of AI-driven ventures shaping the future of technology in the MENA region.
